preflight.note: Created before implementation. Pip-pins RepoPact after the preflight guard was generalized upstream in 1.9.0 (RepoPact decision 0018), removing the last reason to vendor.

acceptance_criteria.text: Pin repopact==1.9.0 in requirements-repopact.txt and remove the vendored RepoPact modules from scripts/; .local/validate_system.py invokes `python -m repopact_cli validate`.

Enable the upstream opt-in preflight via governance/owners.json (enabled, required_from_id 10); verify it enforces markers for items 010+ identically to the former vendored patch (a marker-less item fails; the tree passes).
schemas/ remain in-repo; scripts/LOCAL_EXTENSIONS.md records zero carried patches; python .local/validate_system.py and the Electron suite pass.
